name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
New Dior Groove 20cm handbag black leather oblique
This Dior Groove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Collection, accented with gold-finished stars, unique and distinctive. The key charm opens the zip lock. The spacious compartment features a slip pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap,
Model:8809
Dimensions:20.5x13.5x12cm
